definitions.text: A structure built or serving as an abode of human beings. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: This is my house and my family's ancestral home.

definitions.text: An apartment building within a public housing estate.
To keep within a structure or container.
examples: The car is housed in the garage.

definitions.text: To admit to residence; to harbor.
To take shelter or lodging; to abide; to lodge.
